steps.name: Then  Add library screen is opened
When  Add library "LYRASIS Reads" on Add library screen
Then  Account "LYRASIS Reads" is present on Accounts screen
When  Enter credentials for 'LYRASIS Reads' account
And  Search 'available' book of distributor 'Axis 360' and bookType 'EBOOK' from "LYRASIS Reads" and save as 'bookNameInfo'
And  Open EBOOK book with GET action button and 'bookNameInfo' bookName on catalog books screen and save book as 'bookInfo'
And  Click GET action button and cancel downloading by click CANCEL button on book detail screen
Then  Check that book contains DOWNLOAD action button on book details screen
steps.statusMessage: Button 'Download' is not present on book details screen. Error (if present) -
steps.statusTrace:
java.lang.AssertionError: Button 'Download' is not present on book details screen. Error (if present) -

	at org.junit.Assert.assertTrue(Assert.java:42)
	at stepdefinitions.BookDetailsSteps.checkThatBookContainsActionButton(BookDetailsSteps.java:125)
	at ✽.Check that book contains DOWNLOAD action button on book details screen(file:///home/runner/work/mobile-integration-tests/mobile-integration-tests/src/test/java/features/Distributors.feature:184)

steps.name: And  Check that book contains RETURN action button on book details screen
